stemHtml: For a special VFR departure, which ATC phrase would you expect to hear?

options.a: Via route Whiskey, cleared 3000 feet or below, report Whiskey one as special VFR.
options.b: Cleared to leave the control zone VFR under special routing via route Whiskey, 3000 feet or below.
options.c: Leave control zone special VFR via route Whiskey, 3000 feet or below, report Whiskey one.
options.d: Special VFR to destination, passing Wicken VOR, climbing 3000 feet.
